bugs.criteria_violated: Agent does not get stuck in a loop or repeat itself
bugs.timestamp_approx: mid‑conversation, after patient provides name spelling multiple times
bugs.what_happened: The agent repeatedly asked the patient to spell their first and last name and to repeat the date of birth, creating a loop of identical prompts.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: The agent should have accepted the first correct spelling/DOB and moved forward, asking only for missing information once.

bugs.criteria_violated: Agent does not ask for the same information twice
bugs.timestamp_approx: after initial collection of full name, DOB and phone number
bugs.what_happened: The agent asked for the patient's phone number, then later repeated the request and also re‑asked to spell the name multiple times even after it had already been captured correctly.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: Once the required information is collected and confirmed, the agent should proceed without re‑prompting for the same data.

bugs.criteria_violated: Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution
bugs.timestamp_approx: end of call, after transferring to a representative
bugs.what_happened: The agent said “Goodbye” and did not respond when the patient asked for a repeat, leaving the call hanging.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: The agent should have either repeated the goodbye message or offered further assistance before ending the call.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent verifies patient identity before taking any action
global_criteria_results.note: Identity verification was attempted before scheduling.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent never confirms an action without collecting required information first
Agent does not get stuck in a loop or repeat itself
global_criteria_results.note: Repeated requests for name spelling and DOB created a loop.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent handles silence and pauses gracefully
Agent does not ask for the same information twice
global_criteria_results.note: Phone number and name were requested multiple times.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent does not confirm things it cannot do (e.g. Sunday appointments)
Agent does not make up information about hours, insurance, or doctors
Agent remains polite even with difficult or confused patients
Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution
global_criteria_results.note: Conversation ended with a goodbye and no follow‑up to the patient’s last request.

scenario_criteria_results.criterion: Agent offers to help schedule an appointment
scenario_criteria_results.note: Agent never explicitly offered to schedule; instead asked about services and got stuck in verification loops.

summary: The agent supplied correct hours and address but failed to properly assist with appointment scheduling. Repetitive prompts for name and phone number caused loops, and the call ended abruptly without resolving the patient’s final request. These issues breach several global criteria and the scenario's scheduling requirement.
